response.justification: Wei Chen is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, deeply matching the core tech stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He brings highly relevant experience in cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes), robust testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD), and even directly addresses the niche requirement for AI-agent development (MCP infrastructure). While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his extensive background in building scalable systems and testing frameworks makes him an exceptional candidate for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Direct experience building AI agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong advocate for software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD, backed by experience teaching technical workshops.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest on the resume, though his Node.js and testing expertise mitigates this.
Has operated at a Staff/Founder level recently; need to ensure alignment with a Mid-Senior Individual Contributor role.
Relatively frequent job transitions (1.5 to 3-year tenures) may warrant a discussion regarding long-term commitment.
